articles.title_en: ‘We’re no mutineers’: Three years after Yevgeny Prigozhin’s march on Moscow, Wagner veterans still can’t agree on what it meant

articles.title_en: For years, Ukrainian strikes stalled within a few kilometers of the front. Meduza mapped thousands of geolocated attacks and found they now reach far behind Russian lines.
articles.lead_en: The war in Ukraine is entering a new phase: while the Russian military’s offensive is bogged down at the front, the Ukrainian Armed Forces have pulled ahead in the drone race. Meduza has already written about how this Ukrainian success led to a fuel collapse in Crimea, how drones broke through Moscow’s layered air defenses, and how strikes on oil refineries have plunged entire regions into a gasoline crisis.

articles.title_en: Russian tech firm supplies shooting simulators to Strategic Missile Force personnel
articles.lead_en: Shooting simulators allow trainees to practice shooting skills in an environment as close as possible to real conditions, including at night, and automatically collect data on performance results, Rostec said
articles.title_raw: Russian tech firm supplies shooting simulators to Strategic Missile Force personnel

articles.title_en: Russia to add North Korea’s role in war against Ukraine to school history textbook
articles.lead_en: Russia’s unified school history textbook will be updated to include North Korean troops’ participation in fighting in the Kursk region, Mikhail Myagkov, scientific director of the Russian Military Historical Society, told RBC.
articles.title_raw: Russia to add North Korea’s role in war against Ukraine to school history textbook

articles.title_en: Russian troops strike Ukrainian army’s UAV assembly, storage sites over past day
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Battlegroup West inflicted more than 220 casualties on Ukrainian troops and destroyed two enemy artillery guns in its area of responsibility over the past day, the Defense Ministry reported

articles.title_en: Ukraine Strikes Electronics Plant in Voronezh
articles.lead_en: Ukraine’s military claimed the manufacturing plant in southern Russia produces electronic components for the Russian armed forces.

articles.title_en: US biolabs in Ukraine likely developed offensive weapons — Scott Ritter
articles.lead_en: According to the expert, the presence of such weapons in Ukraine increases the risk of provocations involving the leakage and spread of pathogens, which the West will attempt to blame on Russia
